typed_hook: A familiar room contains one wrong detail.
typed_narration: The child notices the class clock ticking backward before anyone else reacts.
next_page_question: Why does the clock stop only when the child looks away?
final_hook_sentence: Then the clock writes the child's name in dust.
reader_retention_goal: Hold curiosity around the backward clock and the named warning.
visual_memory_point: a dusty classroom clock with reversed hands
technique_notes: page_turn_hook leaves a concrete unanswered question
emotional_pull ties the detail to the child's isolation
